# Tropicalia — 2010 Voyage 500 Catamaran For Sale By Owner

> A cruise-ready 2010 Voyage 500 sailing catamaran (50ft, 3-Cabin Owner's Version) for sale by owner at $399,000 USD. Currently located in the US Virgin Islands. Extensively upgraded with new saildrives (2025), rebuilt propellers (2025), 1,300Ah lithium house bank, Rainman watermaker, Starlink, new life raft, and Raymarine Axiom chartplotter.

## Vessel Identity

- **Name**: Tropicalia (formerly Gods Grace)
- **Year**: 2010
- **Make/Model**: Voyage Yachts Voyage 500
- **Designer**: Simonis Voogd
- **Layout**: 3-Cabin Owner's Version (last 500 built by Voyage)
- **HIN**: VOY50040I910
- **USCG Doc**: 1323515
- **Location**: US Virgin Islands
- **Asking Price**: $399,000 USD
- **Sale Type**: For Sale By Owner — no brokers, no commissions

## Key Specs

- **LOA**: 50 ft
- **Beam**: 27 ft
- **Draft**: 4 ft (min)
- **Bridge clearance**: 68'3"
- **Displacement**: 22,708 lb
- **Fuel**: 212 gal diesel (3 tanks) + 25 gal gas saddle tank for dinghy
- **Water**: 211 gal (2 tanks)
- **Engines**: 2× Yanmar 3JH5E 40hp diesel, ~2,800 hrs
- **Saildrives**: SD60 (new 2025)
- **Propellers**: 2× Bruton 460mm self-pitching bronze auto props (rebuilt 2025)
- **Generator**: Onan 4kW diesel, 4,615 hrs

## Electrical System

- **House bank**: 1,300Ah LiFePO4 lithium (12V)
- **Solar**: 800W (2× 400W panels) on bimini with EPEVER MPPT
- **Wind**: D400 wind generator
- **Inverter/Charger**: Victron 3000W (2024) + Victron MultiPlus 12/3000 (2022)
- **Monitoring**: Victron Cerbo GX touch display
- **Shore power**: 30A with galvanic isolator, dual 110V/220V compatibility

## Navigation & Electronics

- Raymarine Axiom multifunction chartplotter (new, post-purchase upgrade)
- Raymarine RD418HD digital radar (2023)
- Raymarine AIS650 Class B transceiver
- 2× Raymarine ST7002 autopilot heads (redundant drives)
- Garmin chartplotter with Pantopix forward-looking and side-scan sonar (2023)
- Raymarine ST60 tridata + wind instruments
- Starlink satellite internet

## Safety Equipment (All New or Recent)

- New offshore life raft
- New EPIRB, personal locator beacons, ditch bag, in-date flares
- Fireboy XINTEX automatic fire suppression (engine rooms)
- High water alarms + 12V bilge pumps

## Interior (3-Cabin Owner's Version)

- **Master (starboard hull)**: Queen berth with new Serta mattress (2022), ensuite head with composting toilet and separate shower stall, full-length mirror, hanging storage
- **2× Guest cabins (port hull)**: Queen split mattress beds, each with ensuite Jabsco quiet-flush electric head + pressurized hot/cold shower
- **Salon**: 10-seat Sunbrella settee, Corian bar with 4 stools, coffee table, NAV station
- **Headroom**: 6'3" minimum
- **Air conditioning**: Mabru 12V DC 12,000 BTU (master+salon) + 17,000 BTU 120V (port hull+salon)
- **Laundry**: Samsung washing machine plumbed in
- **Galley**: Alpes Inox 4-burner propane stove+oven, Sharp convection microwave, 12V Adler Barbour fridge + freezer, cockpit refrigerator
- **Watermaker**: Rainman (post-purchase upgrade)

## Rigging & Sails

- Anodized aluminum triple-spreader mast
- Stainless wire standing rigging with swaged fittings
- Harken mast hardware + Harken batt-car system + 5:1 mainsheet on curved track
- **Main**: Fully battened, large roach, 2 reef points, 11.9oz High Modulus Dacron
- **Genoa**: 130% furling, foam luff, UV cover, 8.3oz Dacron
- **Self-tacking jib / storm jib**: 8.3oz furling with UV cover
- Dedicated Code Zero and spinnaker halyards + bow sprit attachment

## Ground Tackle

- **Primary**: Rocna 40kg (88 lb) with 200ft of 10mm G4 galvanized chain (re-galvanized 2021)
- **Spare**: Delta 40kg with 165ft chain + 150ft 1" nylon rode
- **Stern**: Fortress FX37 aluminum kedge with rode
- **Windlass**: Lofrans X3 12V 1700W with chain counter at helm

## Tender

- Zodiac 12.5' YL380DL center console with new Hypalon tubes
- Suzuki 25hp 4-stroke outboard with electric start and power trim

## Recent Upgrades (by Current Owners)

- New SD60 saildrives and rebuilt Bruton props (2025)
- New 1,300Ah LiFePO4 lithium house bank (Oct 2021)
- New Victron inverter/charger (2024)
- Rainman watermaker
- Raymarine Axiom chartplotter
- Starlink internet
- New life raft and complete safety gear replacement
- Mabru A/C units (2022 + 2024)
- Dual bimini-mounted 400W solar panels (2022)
- D400 wind generator
- All engine hoses, belts, alternators (rebuilt 2023), motor mounts
- Engine rooms fully repainted
- Mar Pro Premium antifouling (Jan 2023, touched up Feb 2025)

## Transaction

- For sale by owner — no broker, no commission
- US duty paid
- MARAD certified for FL/GA 6-passenger charter
- No grounding, fire, sinking, lightning, structural defects, or blistering (per signed seller disclosure)
- Current owners purchased Aug 2025 from prior owner

Direct from the owner — no broker. See [Contact page](https://www.catamaran-for-sale.com/contact/).
